title: FluxZoom
description: Adds a various items to Zoom in Minecraft 1.7.10!
body:
Adds various items to Zoom in Minecraft 1.7.10!

This is my attempt to balace zoom mods a little bit more and make them more immersive!

You can zoom by holding any of the various items, or by pressing a keybind with either item present in your inventory or a configured baubles slot. All items zoom the same amount. 

You can also zoom outward if you're in third person.

Config to allow zooming without any items

Configurable Zoom baubles slot and functionality

Config for cinematic zoom controls including punching to toggle it off and on while zooming

Zoom logic taken from Zume! That means you can scroll in and out very smoothly while zoomed!

REQUIRES UNIMIXINS!

Feel free to PR or submit models or textures!
